message:
feat: integration tests for auto-repair with real extension patterns (bd-k5q5.8.7)

6 integration tests simulating real community extension failure modes:
monorepo escape (qualisero), missing assets (interview-tool), dist→src
(npm), CJS double-wrap, named activate, and combined patterns.
